nodes.name: Sub-Workflow Input
nodes.notes: Receives: system_prompt, user_prompt, model (sonnet|opus), workflow_name, client_name, purpose

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $json.model_id, max_tokens: $json.max_tokens, system: $json.system_prompt, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.user_prompt }] }) }}

nodes.name: Claude API Call
nodes.notes: Configure credential: Header Name = 'x-api-key', Header Value = your Anthropic API key

nodes.name: Return Response
nodes.notes: Returns: content, parsed_content, model, token counts, costs
